creator: freebsd@pk1048.com
text:
gitlist-1.0.1 installs php72 as a dependency, but it also requires php72-hash and php72-ctype which it does not install as part of the 'pkg install gitlist'. I suspect this is fallout from the deprecation of php5 as php7 includes far fewer components in the base FreeBSD package compared to php5.

Thank you.
